# Strato icons

This package contains the icons for the Strato Design System. See [About Strato](https://developer.dynatrace.com/design/about-strato-design-system/) to learn about Strato's design foundations and patterns and the complete Strato React component library.

## Documentation

Search for icons and meanings in [Strato icons](https://developer.dynatrace.com/design/icons/).

## Installation

```sh
npm install @dynatrace/strato-icons
```

## Releases

Non-breaking changes are released every two weeks. Breaking changes are limited to twice per year.

- Learn about [Strato versioning](https://developer.dynatrace.com/design/strato-versioning/).

- Check the [release notes](https://developer.dynatrace.com/release-notes/design-system/design-tokens-changelog).
